overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a suburban desert community at golden hour, transitioning from residential streets to an elevated roadway overlooking the Night City skyline. The environment features red rock formations, palm trees, futuristic billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential street with red rock mountain backdrop

events.description: passing a pedestrian in a red tank top walking in the opposite direction
approaching intersection with traffic lights and street signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential houses and palm trees with a red rock mountain in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tank top and shorts walking toward the camera
red sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large reddish desert mountain formation dominating the background horizon
tall palm trees with dry fronds lining the left side of the sidewalk
single-story suburban house with chain-link fence and weathered paint
wooden electrical pole with transformers and overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a suburban sidewalk during golden hour, passing palm trees and modest houses with a massive red rock mountain looming in the distance. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the warm, hazy light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and digital advertising

events.description: crossing the multi-lane road at the intersection with other pedestrians
passing a large digital billboard and entering a more commercial area

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the Sequoia intersection alongside a group of other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction
silver sedan stopped at the red traffic light waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light and street sign reading SEQUOIA
large illuminated digital billboard displaying a portrait advertisement
tall modern street light with horizontal LED fixture

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection at Sequoia street, moving from residential to commercial zones. A large digital billboard dominates the right side while vehicles wait at the traffic light, and the red rock formation shifts to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved roadway with panoramic city overlook

events.description: road curves revealing the Night City skyline through atmospheric haze
black truck passes by on the right side of the curved road

agents.ego_description: walking along a descending curved road with the Night City skyline visible ahead through the haze

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving past on the curved descending road
pedestrian in green shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barrier along the road edge
large billboard displaying PIPE OVERKILL advertisement with neon graphics
distant futuristic cityscape with skyscrapers visible through golden hour haze
tall communication tower with red lights rising above the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a descending curved roadway lined with concrete barriers and large digital billboards. The view opens up to reveal the distant Night City skyline bathed in warm sunlight, with vehicles passing by on the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy suburban desert community that gradually opens up to reveal a sprawling futuristic skyline. It begins with the character walking along a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees, while a massive red rock mountain looms in the distance under the warm glow of golden hour. As the character reaches the Sequoia street intersection, the environment shifts from quiet houses to a commercial zone dominated by a large digital billboard and waiting vehicle traffic. The scene then transitions onto a descending curved roadway, where the camera follows the character past concrete barriers and more glowing advertisements. Finally, the view expands across the multi-lane road to reveal the distant Night City skyline bathed in sunlight.
